title: ReviewFlow - Automated Happy Customer Review Collection
problem_statement: Small business owners struggle to get happy customers to leave Google reviews, while unhappy customers go out of their way to complain publicly. There's no frictionless, non-awkward way to capture positive reviews at the right moment.
target_user: Small business owners (restaurants, salons, contractors, local services)
reasoning: There are 33M+ small businesses in the US alone, and Google reviews directly impact revenue. While tools like Podium and Birdeye exist, they charge $300+/mo which prices out most small businesses. A simpler, affordable tool focused purely on review generation with smart timing triggers (e.g., post-purchase SMS, NFC tap cards, QR receipts) could capture the long tail of small businesses.
